---
title: "Predictive Analytics Report (A2)"
author: "Firstname SURNAME (s1234567)"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
opts_chunk$set(eval = TRUE)
opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
opts_chunk$set(out.width = "100%")
```

## 1. Introduction

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Morbi vitae diam non sem gravida
imperdiet quis in sapien. Curabitur urna dui, pulvinar nec sapien eu, porta sodales quam. Nulla
vitae facilisis risus. In consectetur fermentum velit sit amet volutpat. Morbi lobortis sit amet
justo id laoreet. Aenean tortor mauris, fermentum sed fringilla at, venenatis nec ante. Ut vitae
lacinia tortor, non fermentum mi. Phasellus euismod vel erat ac laoreet. Morbi ultricies ultricies
congue. Ut enim tellus, pellentesque ac lobortis dapibus, vulputate nec felis. Aliquam erat
volutpat. Integer pretium nulla a massa vulputate vulputate eget non mauris. Cras eu fringilla mi.
Nam sodales maximus felis et bibendum.

### Data Processing

Write some text that describes what the MSD.Rdata file is, including some of your own background research 
about where it comes from, etc. Echo the line of code which loads the data.

```{r data processing}
load('MSD.RData')
```

Write some more basic text that describes data structure. For example, you could report that there are
`r nrow(MSD)` rows in the data. Write some more text, and include some more inline code.

## 3. Exploratory Analysis

Section introduction text.

### Descriptive Statistics

Some text. Here's a table:

```{r}
table(MSD$mode, MSD$time_signature) |> kable()
```

### Visualisations

More text. Here's a plot:

```{r}
plot(MSD$mode)
```

## 3. Predictive Analytics

### Initial Models

### Dealing with Missing Data

### Model Validation

### Predicitions

## 4. Recommendations

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Morbi vitae diam non sem gravida
imperdiet quis in sapien. Curabitur urna dui, pulvinar nec sapien eu, porta sodales quam. Nulla
vitae facilisis risus. In consectetur fermentum velit sit amet volutpat. Morbi lobortis sit amet
justo id laoreet. Aenean tortor mauris, fermentum sed fringilla at, venenatis nec ante. Ut vitae
lacinia tortor, non fermentum mi. Phasellus euismod vel erat ac laoreet. Morbi ultricies ultricies
congue. Ut enim tellus, pellentesque ac lobortis dapibus, vulputate nec felis. Aliquam erat
volutpat. Integer pretium nulla a massa vulputate vulputate eget non mauris. Cras eu fringilla mi.
Nam sodales maximus felis et bibendum.
